notes: The game did not boot at all given the chosen Proton version, switching to Experimental and all the other ones did not change anything. This is strange because the game is supposedly marked playable and I have seen gameplay of it on the Steam Deck before, but nothing from recently. I am on the latest version of the Stable update channel of SteamOS. Embers or Valve need to address this in an update, this game would definitely run well  if it could even start.
title: Strayed Lights
